docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CASTELLUCCIO, FUSAE AS TO RESPONDENT LOGORECI, LORENZO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE (NOTICE OF HEARING) FILED BY PETITIONER CASTELLUCCIO, FUSAE HEARING SET FOR NOV-02-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND ORDERING THE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN CONFORMITY WITH THE ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CASTELLUCCIO, FUSAE
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-02-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
RESPONDENT'S NON-OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT LOGORECI, LORENZO

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER FUSAE CASTELLUCCIO'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD - GRANT - NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS (302/REQ). HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CASTELLUCCIO, FUSAE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOGORECI, LORENZO THE CLAIMANT FUSAE CASTELLUCIO AND RESPONDENT LORENZO LOGORECI ARE OREDED TO COMPLY. EACH PARTY BEARS ITS OWN ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS. (SEE SCANNED DOC(302/PHA)
ORDER ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND TO ENTER JUDGMENT IN CONFORMITY WITH THE ARBITRATION AWARD

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Nov-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FUSAE CASTELLUCCIO'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
APPEARANCES: Peter Zouras, 415-974-1800, Law Office of Peter Zouras for Respondent and Opposing Party; Quinton B. Cutlip, Esq., 415-981-4612 for Petitioner and Moving Party.
RULING: Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT - NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open. Moving Party to submit proposed judgment and supplemental briefs (302/REQ). Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
